name: Coda
description: Coda document and spreadsheet platform API. List docs, manage tables, and perform CRUD operations on rows within Coda documents.

credential_fields.name: apiToken
credential_fields.label: Api Token
credential_fields.description: Coda API token (generate at coda.io/account under API settings)

tools.name: list_docs
tools.description: List all Coda documents accessible by the authenticated user. Returns docs in reverse chronological order. Supports filtering by name search query and pagination.

limit.description: Maximum number of docs to return (default 25).

pageToken.description: Pagination token from a previous response to fetch the next page.

query.description: Search query to filter docs by name.

tools.name: get_doc
tools.description: Retrieve details for a specific Coda document by its ID. Returns the document's name, owner, creation date, folder, and other metadata.

docId.description: The unique identifier of the Coda document.

tools.name: list_tables
tools.description: List all tables in a Coda document. Returns table metadata including IDs, names, column information, and row counts. Works for both base tables and views.

docId.description: The unique identifier of the Coda document.

limit.description: Maximum number of tables to return (default 25).

pageToken.description: Pagination token from a previous response to fetch the next page.

tools.name: list_rows
tools.description: List rows in a table within a Coda document. Supports filtering with a query, sorting, pagination, and configurable value formatting. Returns cell values for each row.

docId.description: The unique identifier of the Coda document.

tableIdOrName.description: The ID or name of the table. IDs are preferred as names may change.

limit.description: Maximum number of rows to return (default 25).

pageToken.description: Pagination token from a previous response to fetch the next page.

query.description: Filter query in the format 'column:value' to search for matching rows.

useColumnNames.description: Use column names instead of IDs in the response values.

valueFormat.description: Format for cell values in the response.

visibleOnly.description: Only return rows visible in the table view (applies filters/sorts).

tools.name: insert_row
tools.description: Insert one or more new rows into a table in a Coda document. Provide an array of row objects with cell values. Optionally specify key columns to upsert (update existing rows if matched). Returns HTTP 202 as inserts are processed asynchronously.

docId.description: The unique identifier of the Coda document.

tableIdOrName.description: The ID or name of the table to insert rows into. Must be a base table (not a view).

rows.description: Array of row objects to insert.

cells.description: Array of cell objects for the row.

value.description: The value to set for this cell. Type depends on the column type.

keyColumns.description: Optional array of column IDs/names to use as upsert keys. If provided, existing rows matching these columns will be updated instead of inserting duplicates.

tools.name: update_row
tools.description: Update a specific row in a table within a Coda document. Provide the row ID and the cell values to update. Only specified cells are changed; omitted cells remain unchanged. Returns HTTP 202 as updates are processed asynchronously.

docId.description: The unique identifier of the Coda document.

tableIdOrName.description: The ID or name of the table containing the row.

rowIdOrName.description: The ID or name of the row to update. IDs are preferred as names may change.

row.description: Row object containing the cells to update.

cells.description: Array of cell objects with updated values.

value.description: The new value for this cell.
